task: top-K recommendation (collaborative filtering with auxiliary knowledge base)
input: user-item interaction matrix + knowledge base (structured, textual, visual content)
backbone: collaborative filtering with knowledge base embeddings (TransR, SDAE, SCAE)
key_idea: jointly learn collaborative filtering latent factors and item semantic representations from heterogeneous knowledge base (structural, textual, visual)
datasets: two real-world datasets (not named in abstract)
